auth.loginDescription: Access your saved projects and cost estimates.
auth.signupDescription: Sign up with email or Google.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
auth.supabaseNotConfigured: Supabase is not configured. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to .env.local.

landing.heroTitle: Design your space. Understand the cost.
landing.heroSubtitle: Draw floorplans in 2D, furnish in 3D, and get a living estimate for furniture, finishes, labor, and delivery—before you commit.
landing.purposeBody: QuickQuote3D helps students, designers, and homeowners visualize interiors and attach indicative pricing to every choice—from beds and tables to wall and floor finishes—so you can compare scenarios and communicate budgets clearly.
landing.f1Desc: Sketch walls, switch to 3D, and walk the room before you buy a single piece.
landing.f2Desc: Drop in real 3D models for beds, storage, lighting, seating, doors, and windows.
landing.f3Desc: See furniture line items, finish areas, and labor / delivery / contingency in one summary.
landing.f4Desc: With an account, sync floorplans to the cloud so you can return, revise, and share later.
landing.saveBody: Browsing the landing is open to everyone. Creating and saving projects requires a free account so your layouts stay private and tied to you.
landing.footer: FYP / educational use—estimates are indicative, not professional quotes.
landing.heroSubtitleLong: Draw floor plans in 2D, furnish in 3D, and see furniture, finishes, and fees update in a live estimate.
landing.trustedBy: Built for students, designers, and homeowners planning real spaces
landing.featuresSubheading: From wall drawing to shareable quotes — the features you use inside QuickQuote3D today.
landing.howItWorksHeading: From sketch to quote in 3 steps
landing.step1Desc: Sketch walls in the 2D floorplanner or open a ready-made room layout.
landing.step2Desc: Add catalog furniture, apply wall and floor textures, and watch costs update live.
landing.step3Desc: Send a share link to clients or download a PDF estimate for approvals.
landing.ctaBandTitle: Ready to plan your next room?
landing.ctaBandSubtitle: Open the planner, drop in furniture, and watch your estimate build itself.
landing.faq1A: No. QuickQuote3D is built for people who understand spaces, not complex CAD tools. Draw walls, drag furniture, and get a cost summary in minutes.
landing.faq2Q: What does the cost estimate include?
landing.faq2A: Furniture line items, priced wall and floor finishes by area, plus configurable labor, delivery, and contingency in the estimate panel.
landing.faq3Q: Can I share a project with a client?
landing.faq3A: Yes. Generate a shareable read-only link so clients can view the layout and estimate without signing in or editing your work.
landing.faq4Q: Can I use my own products and textures?
landing.faq4A: Yes. Upload custom 3D items and priced textures in Settings so your catalog and finish rates match your business.
landing.faq5Q: Is there a free way to try it?
landing.faq5A: You can explore the planner and build layouts. Saving to the cloud and advanced workflows require a free account when auth is enabled.
landing.footerTagline: Design your space. Know your cost.
landing.f5Desc: Send clients a read-only link to review the layout and estimate without editing access.
landing.f6Desc: Upload your own 3D models and priced surface textures to match your catalog.
landing.f7Desc: Export a professional, itemized quote with quantities, rates, and totals in one click.
landing.f8Desc: Snap furniture to walls and surfaces, resize pieces, and mount items on top of others.
landing.f9Desc: Start fast from bedroom, kitchen, and other presets instead of drawing from scratch.
landing.f10Desc: Work in English, Simplified Chinese, or Traditional Chinese across the planner.

floorplanner.escHint: Press the "Esc" key to stop drawing walls
floorplanner.wallLengthHint: Enter the length for this wall. You can use the same format as the labels (e.g. 7'4"), or a number in your current unit, or values like 2.5 m / 150 cm.
floorplanner.wallLengthInvalid: Could not read that length. Check the number and try again.
floorplanner.moveDoubleClickLength: Double-click a wall (Move mode) to type an exact length.

controlsHelp.moveModeDesc: Click and drag walls or corners to adjust room shape
controlsHelp.drawModeDesc: Click to place new wall points. Press ESC to finish drawing.
controlsHelp.deleteModeDesc: Click on walls or corners to remove them
controlsHelp.zoomPanMobile: Pinch to zoom, drag with two fingers to pan
controlsHelp.zoomPanDesktop: Mouse wheel to zoom, middle-click drag to pan
controlsHelp.oneFingerDesc: Drag to rotate camera around the scene
controlsHelp.twoFingerDesc: Pinch to zoom in and out
controlsHelp.tapObjectDesc: Select furniture to move, rotate, or delete
controlsHelp.mouseWheelDesc: Scroll to zoom in and out
controlsHelp.clickObjectDesc: Select furniture to move, rotate, or delete
controlsHelp.tip2d: Tip: Click "Done" when finished to switch to 3D view
controlsHelp.tip3d: Tip: Switch between 2D and 3D views using the toggle at the top

textureSelector.wallColorHint: Decorative only — not included in cost estimate.
textureSelector.noTextures: No textures available for this surface.

catalogTextures.settingsDescription: Upload your own finishes. Set a price per square meter or square foot — the cost estimate uses the measured wall or floor area automatically.
catalogTextures.emptyList: No custom textures yet. Add one to use it in 3D view and in cost estimates.
catalogTextures.title: Add texture
catalogTextures.name: Name
catalogTextures.stretchHint: When off, the image tiles across the surface.
catalogTextures.imageOptionalEdit: Leave blank to keep the current image.
catalogTextures.unexpectedError: Could not save this texture. Please try again.

myFloorplans.title: My Saved Floorplans
myFloorplans.subtitle: Open a saved plan or continue where you left off
myFloorplans.saveFirst: Save your first floorplan to see it here
myFloorplans.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this floorplan?

settings.title: Settings
settings.dimensionUnitDescription: Select the unit system for displaying dimensions in the floorplan.

itemPricing.title: Items
itemPricing.description: Manage item categories, filters, and pricing in {currency}. Signed-in users can override prices for their account only.
itemPricing.filtersDescription: Add, remove, reorder categories and assign catalog items to filters.

showOnlyCustomItems.label: Your catalog only
showOnlyCustomItems.description: Hide built-in sample furniture from the item list. Items already on your floorplan are not affected.

roomTypes.title: Room types
roomTypes.description: Add, edit, and remove room types used when saving floorplans.

wallHeight.title: Wall height
wallHeight.description: Adjust global wall height for the current plan. Values are converted to centimeters internally.

items.invalidPlacement: Cannot place item here — it would overlap a wall. Move it fully inside the room.

customItems.title: Add custom item
customItems.name: Item name
customItems.dimensionsAutoDetected: Dimensions auto-detected from your model. Adjust if needed.
customItems.dimensionsNormalized: Dimensions adjusted to a typical size for this category while keeping proportions.
customItems.dimensionsDetectError: Could not read model size. Enter dimensions manually.
customItems.unexpectedError: Could not add this item. Please try again.
customItems.settingsDescription: Manage your uploaded furniture and decorations. Edit or remove items from your catalog.
customItems.emptyList: No custom items yet. Add one from the items panel or here.
customItems.placementOnItemHint: Click on a table, chair, or other floor furniture to place this item.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this item?
confirmDelete.descriptionNamed: Delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

share.dialogDescription: Anyone with the link can view "{name}" in 2D and 3D with a read-only cost estimate.
share.saveFirst: Save your floorplan to the cloud before sharing.
share.saveFirstHint: Use Save in the toolbar, then open Share again.
share.shareError: Could not create share link. Please try again.
share.noLinkYet: Create a link to share this plan as a read-only snapshot.
share.notFoundDescription: This link may have been revoked or never existed.

newDialog.title: New Floorplan
newDialog.description: Select the room type for your new floorplan.

saveDialog.title: Save Floorplan
saveDialog.description: Enter a name for your floorplan. You can find it later in 'My Floorplans'.
saveDialog.saveError: Failed to save floorplan. Please try again.

estimate.title: Cost estimate
estimate.disclaimer: Indicative only — not a formal quote. Prices are illustrative until you align them with your market.
estimate.noLineItems: Add furniture, apply textures, or draw a room to see costs.
estimate.loadPricingError: Could not load pricing; using built-in defaults.
estimate.savePlanFirst: Save your floorplan to the cloud first, then you can save estimates for this project.
estimate.saveRemoteUnavailable: Saving estimates requires signing in with Supabase configured.
estimate.sharedSnapshotHint: Cost estimate frozen when this plan was shared ({date}).
